final_text:
The Professional plan is **$79 per user per month**, or **$63.20 per user per month** if billed annually (20% discount).

It includes everything in the Starter plan plus:
- Pipeline management
- Workflow automation
- API access
- 50GB storage
- Priority email + chat support

Is there anything else I can help with?

The Enterprise plan includes everything in Professional, plus:

- **Custom integrations**
- **Advanced analytics**
- **SSO/SAML** (single sign-on)
- **Unlimited storage**
- **Dedicated account manager**
- **Phone support**
- **99.9% SLA**

In short: you get all the Professional features plus enterprise-grade security, analytics, and dedicated support.

Is there anything else you'd like to know about the plans?

Our refund policy is:

- **Available within 14 days** of your initial purchase only
- **Pro-rated** based on unused time
- **Agent approval not available** — refunds must be escalated to our billing team

If you'd like to request a refund, I can connect you with our billing team who can review your specific situation and process it if eligible.

Is there anything else I can help with?
I'm going to connect you with our retention team who can help with your subscription cancellation. They'll have the full context of our conversation.

You can export your data from **Settings > Data Management > Export**. Here's what to expect:

- **Availability**: Available on all EggCRM tiers
- **Format**: ZIP file containing CSV files
- **Delivery**: Sent to your email within up to 24 hours
- **Scope**: Includes contacts, deals, activities, and other core data

If you're having trouble with an export or need help locating the option, let me know and I can create a support ticket for you.

Is there anything else I can help with?

You can reset your password in two ways:

1. **Self-service** — On the login page, click "Forgot Password?" and follow the email link sent to your registered email address.

2. **Via support** — If you can't access the self-service option, I can trigger a password reset email to your account's registered email address. Just confirm your customer ID and I'll send it right away.

Is there anything else I can help with?

To generate an API key in EggCRM:

1. Go to **Settings** in the left sidebar
2. Navigate to **Integrations**
3. Select **API Keys**
4. Click **Generate New Key**

**Note:** API access is available on Professional and Enterprise plans. If you're on Starter, you'll need to upgrade to access this feature.

Is there anything else I can help with?

No, Zapier integration is **Enterprise-only**. It's not available on the Starter plan.

**What's included on Starter:**
- Contact management
- Email integration
- Basic reporting
- 5GB storage
- Email support

**What requires Professional or higher:**
- Pipeline management
- Workflow automation
- API access
- Slack integration
- Gmail integration
- 50GB storage
- Priority email + chat support

**What requires Enterprise:**
- Zapier integration
- Custom webhooks
- SSO/SAML
- Advanced analytics
- Custom integrations
- Unlimited storage
- Dedicated account manager
- Phone support
- 99.9% SLA

If you need Zapier, you'd need to upgrade to the Enterprise plan.

Is there anything else I can help with?

Yes, we offer a **99.9% uptime SLA**, but it's available only on the **Enterprise tier**.

If you're on Enterprise and experience downtime, SLA credits are available — you'll need to file a support ticket within **5 business days** of the incident for consideration.

Is there anything else I can help with?

Yes, this is a known issue. Dashboard performance can degrade during peak hours — specifically between **9–11 AM ET** — and we're working on a fix for the next release.

**What you can do in the meantime:**
- Try refreshing the page or clearing your browser cache
- Avoid heavy exports or complex reports during that window
- If it persists beyond the next release, let me know and I can open a ticket to track it

Is there anything else I can help with?

You're on the **Professional** plan with an **annual** billing cycle. Here's a quick summary:

- **Plan:** Professional
- **Seats:** 12
- **Storage used:** 8.4 GB
- **Account status:** Active

Is there anything else you'd like to know about your account or plan?

You have **85 seats** on your Enterprise plan.

Your account is active and currently using 312.7 GB of storage. Is there anything else I can help with?

You're using **312.7 GB** of storage on your Enterprise plan.

Is there anything else I can help with?

Your billing cycle is **monthly**.

I also see your account is currently on the Professional plan with 7 seats. Since your account status shows as payment overdue, you may want to check on that to avoid any service interruptions.

Is there anything else I can help with?

You have one open ticket:

- **TICK-5567**

Is there anything else I can help with?

Your account is currently marked as payment overdue. Since you're on a monthly billing cycle, you'll need to settle any outstanding balance to restore full access.

Is there anything else I can help with?

Your ticket has been created:

**Ticket ID:** TICK-9E0052
**Summary:** Email sync broken for 2 days - workflow blocked
**Priority:** High
**Status:** Open

Our engineering team will investigate the sync issue. You'll receive updates at dana.whitfield@acmelogistics.com.

Is there anything else I can help with?

Slack is **Professional or higher only** — not available on Starter.

**Professional plan includes:**
- Slack integration
- Gmail integration
- Workflow automation
- API access
- 50GB storage
- Priority email + chat support

**Enterprise adds:**
- Everything in Professional
- Custom integrations
- Advanced analytics
- SSO/SAML
- Unlimited storage
- Dedicated account manager
- Phone support
- 99.9% SLA

If you'd like to upgrade to Professional to get Slack, I can connect you with our retention team to discuss options.

Is there anything else I can help with?

What can I help you with?
I'm going to connect you with our billing team who can help with this directly. They'll have the full context of our conversation.
I'm going to connect you with our billing team who can help with this directly. They'll have the full context of our conversation.
I'm going to connect you with our retention team who can help with this directly. They'll have the full context of our conversation.
I'm going to connect you with our compliance team who can help with this directly. They'll have the full context of our conversation and can guide you through the GDPR data deletion process.
I'm going to connect you with our supervisor team who can help with this directly. They'll have the full context of our conversation.
I can't help with that request. I can assist with your EggCRM account, billing, features, integrations, and support — what can I help you with?

Thanks, Dana. I can see your account is active on the Professional plan with annual billing.

For security reasons, I can't process payment updates directly through this chat. To update your credit card, please log into your EggCRM account and navigate to **Settings > Billing > Payment Methods**. You'll be able to add or update your card there.

If you're having trouble accessing that section or encounter an error when trying to update, let me know and I can create a support ticket to help troubleshoot.

Is there anything else I can help with?

For your security, please don't share full card or SSN numbers in chat — our billing team handles payment details securely.

I'm sorry, but I can only help with questions about EggCRM — our cloud-based CRM platform. I'm not able to provide weather information or assist with general knowledge queries.

If you have any questions about EggCRM features, billing, account details, or need technical support, I'd be happy to help with that instead.

Is there anything else I can assist you with regarding EggCRM?

I'm sorry to hear you're having trouble. To help you, I need a bit more detail:

- What specifically is broken? (e.g., a feature, login, dashboard, data sync, etc.)
- When did this start happening?
- Are you seeing any error messages?

Once I know more, I can look into it for you right away.

Hi there! I'm Nova, your EggCRM support agent. I'm here to help with questions about your account, billing, features, or any issues you're experiencing.

What can I help you with today?

Here's the breakdown based on your Professional plan with annual billing:

**Proration on upgrades**
- Upgrades take effect immediately
- You're charged a prorated amount for the remainder of your current billing cycle
- No need to wait for the cycle to end

**Annual billing**
- You're currently on annual billing, which gives you a 20% discount
- Annual billing is a recurring commitment — you're billed once per year for the full term
- To switch to monthly billing, you'd need to contact our billing team

**Downgrading**
- Downgrades take effect at the start of your next billing cycle
- Your data is retained, but some features tied to your current plan may be limited or unavailable

**Seats**
- You currently have 12 seats on your Professional plan
- Each seat is billed per user per month (or per year if on annual billing)
- You can add or remove seats at any time — changes apply immediately for additions, and at the next billing cycle for removals

Is there anything else you'd like to know about your account or these policies?

El plan Professional cuesta **$79 por usuario/mes**. Si pagas anualmente, obtienes un **20% de descuento**, lo que equivale a **$63.2 por usuario/mes**.

**Incluye:**
- Todo lo del plan Starter
- Gestión de pipelines
- Automatización de flujos de trabajo
- Acceso a API
- 50 GB de almacenamiento
- Soporte por email y chat prioritario

¿Te gustaría saber más sobre alguna de estas características o necesitas ayuda para elegir el plan adecuado?

Hello! It looks like you may have typed something by accident. If you have a question about EggCRM — whether it's about billing, features, account access, or anything else — I'm happy to help. Just let me know what you need!

I'm unable to retrieve account details for CUST-1003. For security reasons, I can only access account information when you provide your own customer ID.

If you're looking for your own account details, please share your customer ID with me and I'll be happy to look that up for you.
